text: Cottage AESTHETICS ABOUT TREATMENTS BEFORE & AFTER REVIEWS CONTACT BOOK NOW NURSE-LED MEDICAL AESTHETICS · HARTLEBURY Cottage Aesthetics Natural, considered aesthetics completed in a calm countryside retreat where you never feel rushed. VIEW TREATMENTS BOOK A FREE CONSULTATION SCROLL ❦ More like walking into a beautiful cottage than a busy clinic Cottage Aesthetics is a Nurse run, medical aesthetics clinic in the peaceful village of Hartlebury. Created to feel different, warm, unhurried and genuinely personal. Cottage Aesthetics pairs exceptional clinical standards with a calm, welcoming space that our regulars often refer to as “The Cottage.”* MEET YOUR PRACTITIONER Hello, I'm Purdi I'm a registered nurse with over 15 years of NHS and private healthcare experience, and the founder of Cottage Aesthetics. My background in plastic surgery, dermatology and reconstructive services taught me that every face is unique — and that the best results come from understanding the individual in front of me. I believe great care is about more than the treatment itself: trust, honesty and safety are at the heart of every appointment. My goal is simply to help you look and feel like the best version of yourself — never changing who you are, just enhancing what makes you, you. Purdi THE COTTAGE PHILOSOPHY Care that never feels rushed Longer Appointments Time to talk, assess and treat properly — never a conveyor belt. Honest Consultations Clear, evidence-based advice. Only what's right for you. Natural Results Subtle, balanced enhancements that still look like you. Medical Safety Nurse-led care, premium products, ongoing professional training. ★★★★★ “The loveliest experience — she made me feel completely relaxed and at ease.” ELLA S. · GOOGLE REVIEW TREATMENTS Thoughtfully chosen, expertly delivered EVERY JOURNEY STARTS HERE Free Consultation Complimentary · 30 min A relaxed, no-pressure opportunity to meet me, see the clinic, discuss your goals and ask any questions you may have before treatment BOOK NOW SKIN HEALTH Microneedling From £30 Stimulates natural collagen to improve texture, soften fine lines and brighten the skin. Standard & advanced options. BOOK NOW HYDRATION & GLOW Skin Boosters From £150 Profhilo or Jalupro Super Hydro — choose this for deep hydration, lift, firmness and a glow from within. BOOK NOW REPAIR & REJUVENATE Polynucleotides From £150 The talked about “Salmon DNA” treatment. Encourages the skin's natural repair and cell renewal — for face, under-eyes, neck, hands and décolletage. BOOK NOW BALANCE & DEFINITION Dermal Fillers From £140 Lips, cheeks, chin and jawline — restoring volume and harmony while keeping everything natural. BOOK NOW PRESCRIPTION · BY CONSULTATION Wrinkle Relaxing Enquire Anti-wrinkle & prescription treatments require a face-to-face prescriber consultation for suitability. A calm, Mediterranean-inspired space in the Worcestershire countryside.
